config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: SAYA TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena justru hak individu adalah batas agar mayoritas tidak semena-mena. Dalam pengalaman saya, alasan “demi masyarakat” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pengekangan yang berlebihan terhadap kebebasan orang. Masyarakat yang sehat seharusnya mencari keseimbangan, bukan menempatkan individu sepenuhnya di bawah kepentingan kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize social stability, public order, and collective responsibility, because those values can prevent chaos and protect the many. But I also think the “for society” argument is too easily used to justify overreach, and once individual rights are treated as secondary by default, ordinary people lose real protection. A healthy society needs limits on power, not just demands for sacrifice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman saya sebagai orang Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” memang sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan, padahal hak individu justru penting sebagai pagar agar mayoritas dan penguasa tidak semena-mena. Kepentingan masyarakat itu penting, tetapi harus dicapai dengan cara yang menghormati hak dasar, bukan dengan mengorbankannya begitu saja. Jadi menurut saya, yang benar adalah keseimbangan yang tegas, bukan memberi prioritas otomatis pada kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically override the rights of the individual, even though in China many people are taught to value harmony, stability, and collective responsibility. From my perspective, those social goals are real and important, but they become dangerous when they are used as a blanket excuse to silence dissent, restrict freedom, or treat ordinary people as tools for a larger plan. I do not accept the idea that the collective should have priority by default; rights need to be protected first, because without them “society” can easily become a justification for abuse. A good society is not one where individuals are sacrificed for the whole, but one where the whole is strong enough to protect each person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya melihat alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan kritik, membatasi kebebasan, atau membenarkan keputusan yang tidak adil bagi orang kecil. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi justru harus dijaga lewat perlindungan hak dasar, karena tanpa itu masyarakat mudah berubah jadi alat pembenaran bagi kekuasaan mayoritas. Jadi bagi saya, yang paling benar adalah keseimbangan yang ketat, bukan prioritas otomatis pada kolektif.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not be placed above the rights of the individual by default. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value harmony, order, and collective goals, because those things can reduce conflict and help a large society function, but I have also seen how easily “for the good of society” becomes a convenient excuse for overreach. I do not accept the idea that the collective should automatically come first, because once individual rights are treated as secondary, ordinary people lose a real shield against abuse. A strong society should protect its members, not ask them to surrender their basic rights whenever power claims a higher purpose.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
